channel.title: Career Thoughts on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Career Thoughts on Frank Huang

item.title: Experience that I learnt from my first job
item.description: From today on, I decided to create a new category talking about the thought that I have during my professional career. So stay tune! Lessons that I learnt during my first job: 1. Data is not just data. I used to be treating data as data which means I don’t care if the data is reasonable as long as it is generated. But after several times of being asked the reasonability of the data that I generated, I finally realized that everytime when the data is generated no matter how, I have to ask myself if the data is reasonable, am I generating it with efficiency, is it in the format that is easy to be used.
